Every local of the Industrial

Local officials of the revolution
airy forces declare that damage
suits will be filed against the city
for the ill-treatment of some of
their members at the time of ar
rests and for alleged unsanitary
condition of the city Jail during
their confinement. One of the
men, James ID. Gordon, who claims
to have been kept for more than
80 hours in a veritable sweatboX
with 33 other prisoners, is said to
be in a serious condition and I'M
der doctors care today.
